requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Performance Rating — SANS 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1)

summary.en: Industrial AC motors placed on the South African market must conform to SANS 60034-1 (the SABS adoption of IEC 60034-1), which specifies ratings and performance requirements including insulation class, temperature rise limits, protection degree (IP), and voltage/frequency tolerances. For motors in scope of an NRCS compulsory specification, conformity to the applicable SANS standard is a condition for the Letter of Authority (LoA). Conformity evidence must be based on testing at an accredited laboratory. SANS 60034-5 (IEC 60034-5) covers IP protection degrees. Rated voltage must be consistent with South Africa's 400/230 V, 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 进入南非市场的工业交流电机须符合SANS 60034-1（SABS采纳的IEC 60034-1），该标准规定额定值和性能要求，包括绝缘等级、温升限值、防护等级（IP）及电压/频率容差。属于NRCS强制规范范围的电机，符合适用SANS标准是取得进口许可证（LoA）的条件。合规证据须基于经认可实验室的测试结果。SANS 60034-5（IEC 60034-5）涵盖IP防护等级。额定电压须与南非400/230 V、50 Hz电网一致。
summary.zht: 進入南非市場的工業交流電機須符合SANS 60034-1（SABS採納的IEC 60034-1），該標準規定額定值和性能要求，包括絕緣等級、溫升限值、防護等級（IP）及電壓/頻率容差。屬於NRCS強制規範範圍的電機，符合適用SANS標準是取得進口許可證（LoA）的條件。合規證據須基於經認可實驗室的測試結果。SANS 60034-5（IEC 60034-5）涵蓋IP防護等級。額定電壓須與南非400/230 V、50 Hz電網一致。

standards_or_laws: SANS 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1 — Rotating electrical machines: rating and performance)
NRCS compulsory specification (references SANS 60034 for LoA conformity)

summary.en: China uses GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) for motor ratings and performance, and GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) for IP protection. Chinese motors built to GB 755 and GB/T 4942 are technically close to SANS 60034-1 and SANS 60034-5 benchmarks, as both reference the same IEC source. However, test reports must reference IEC 60034-1 (not solely GB 755) for NRCS LoA submissions, and motor nameplates must show 400 V (or confirmed 380–420 V dual range) rather than 380 V only. CCC, where it applies, covers some safety aspects but is not recognised by NRCS.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范电机额定值和性能，采用GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）规范IP防护。按GB 755和GB/T 4942制造的中国电机在技术上接近SANS 60034-1和SANS 60034-5基准，因为两者均以相同IEC来源为依据。但NRCS LoA申请须提交引用IEC 60034-1（而非仅GB 755）的测试报告，且电机铭牌应标注400 V（或确认380–420 V双电压范围），而非仅标注380 V。CCC在适用范围内涵盖部分安全方面，但NRCS不予认可。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範電機額定值和性能，採用GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）規範IP防護。按GB 755和GB/T 4942製造的中國電機在技術上接近SANS 60034-1和SANS 60034-5基準，因為兩者均以相同IEC來源為依據。但NRCS LoA申請須提交引用IEC 60034-1（而非僅GB 755）的測試報告，且電機銘牌應標注400 V（或確認380–420 V雙電壓範圍），而非僅標注380 V。CCC在適用範圍內涵蓋部分安全方面，但NRCS不予認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1 — ratings and performance)

gap.en: The technical content of GB 755-2019 and SANS 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1) is largely equivalent, so Chinese motors built to GB 755 are likely to be close to SANS 60034-1 benchmarks. The procedural gaps are: (1) test reports for NRCS LoA must reference IEC/SANS standards, not solely GB standards; (2) the motor nameplate must show 400 V (or a dual-voltage range covering 400 V) rather than only 380 V; (3) an NRCS LoA is required regardless of technical equivalence — it is a South Africa-specific regulatory clearance. IP class evidence (SANS 60034-5) should also be included in LoA documentation.
gap.zh: GB 755-2019与SANS 60034-1（IEC 60034-1）的技术内容大体相当，因此按GB 755制造的中国电机可能接近SANS 60034-1基准。程序性差距在于：(1) NRCS LoA测试报告须引用IEC/SANS标准，而非仅GB标准；(2) 电机铭牌须标注400 V（或覆盖400 V的双电压范围），而非仅标注380 V；(3) 无论技术等效与否，均须取得NRCS LoA——这是南非特有的监管许可。IP等级证据（SANS 60034-5）也应纳入LoA申请文件。
gap.zht: GB 755-2019與SANS 60034-1（IEC 60034-1）的技術內容大體相當，因此按GB 755製造的中國電機可能接近SANS 60034-1基準。程序性差距在於：(1) NRCS LoA測試報告須引用IEC/SANS標準，而非僅GB標準；(2) 電機銘牌須標注400 V（或覆蓋400 V的雙電壓範圍），而非僅標注380 V；(3) 無論技術等效與否，均須取得NRCS LoA——這是南非特有的監管許可。IP等級證據（SANS 60034-5）也應納入LoA申請文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity to SANS 60034-1 / SANS 60034-5 is required for NRCS LoA; 400 V nameplate rating required for South African grid
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 compliance required; GB/T 4942 for IP; no export obligation under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors built to GB 755-2019 are technically close to SANS 60034-1 benchmarks, but NRCS LoA submissions require test reports citing IEC/SANS standards and 400 V nameplate rating. CCC is not recognised. The NRCS LoA is the mandatory market-access clearance regardless of technical equivalence with Chinese standards. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB 755-2019制造的中国电机在技术上接近SANS 60034-1基准，但NRCS LoA申请须提交引用IEC/SANS标准的测试报告，以及铭牌标注400 V。CCC不被认可。无论与中国标准技术等效与否，NRCS LoA均是强制市场准入许可。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB 755-2019製造的中國電機在技術上接近SANS 60034-1基準，但NRCS LoA申請須提交引用IEC/SANS標準的測試報告，以及銘牌標注400 V。CCC不被認可。無論與中國標準技術等效與否，NRCS LoA均是強制市場准入許可。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: IP Protection, Insulation Class, and Nameplate Marking — SANS 60034 Series
requirement_topic.zh: IP防护等级、绝缘等级与铭牌标注——SANS 60034系列
requirement_topic.zht: IP防護等級、絕緣等級與銘牌標注——SANS 60034系列

summary.en: Motors placed on the South African market must carry correct nameplate information per SANS 60034-1 requirements, including: rated voltage (400 V or confirmed dual-voltage range), rated frequency (50 Hz), rated power (kW), efficiency class (IE grade), IP protection class (per SANS 60034-5 / IEC 60034-5), insulation class, and duty cycle. NRCS LoA conformity assessment will check nameplate markings against the compulsory specification requirements. Motors with nameplates showing only 380 V, or missing the IE efficiency class, may face LoA rejection or market surveillance action.
summary.zh: 进入南非市场的电机须按SANS 60034-1要求在铭牌上标注正确信息，包括：额定电压（400 V或确认的双电压范围）、额定频率（50 Hz）、额定功率（kW）、能效等级（IE等级）、IP防护等级（依据SANS 60034-5 / IEC 60034-5）、绝缘等级和工作制。NRCS LoA合规评估将对照强制规范要求核查铭牌标注。铭牌仅标注380 V或缺失IE能效等级的电机，可能面临LoA拒绝或市场监督行动。
summary.zht: 進入南非市場的電機須按SANS 60034-1要求在銘牌上標注正確信息，包括：額定電壓（400 V或確認的雙電壓範圍）、額定頻率（50 Hz）、額定功率（kW）、能效等級（IE等級）、IP防護等級（依據SANS 60034-5 / IEC 60034-5）、絕緣等級和工作制。NRCS LoA合規評估將對照強制規範要求核查銘牌標注。銘牌僅標注380 V或缺失IE能效等級的電機，可能面臨LoA拒絕或市場監督行動。

standards_or_laws: NRCS compulsory specification (marking requirements as condition of LoA)

summary.en: Chinese motors must carry nameplates per GB 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent), including rated voltage (380 V), rated frequency (50 Hz), rated power (kW), efficiency grade (per GB 18613-2020 Grade 1/2/3), IP class, and insulation class. GB 18613-2020 requires the energy efficiency grade to be marked. The main divergences are: (1) rated voltage is 380 V in China vs 400 V required in South Africa; (2) GB 18613-2020 Grade labelling (Grade 1/2/3) differs in presentation from IEC IE1/IE2/IE3 notation, though they are aligned in naming; (3) energy efficiency labelling follows GB/T 28569 format, not SANS/IEC format.
summary.zh: 中国电机须按GB 755-2019（IEC 60034-1等效）标注铭牌，包括额定电压（380 V）、额定频率（50 Hz）、额定功率（kW）、能效等级（按GB 18613-2020等级1/2/3）、IP等级和绝缘等级。GB 18613-2020要求标注能效等级。主要差异：(1) 中国额定电压为380 V，而南非要求400 V；(2) GB 18613-2020等级标注（1/2/3级）与IEC IE1/IE2/IE3表示方式不同，但命名上对应；(3) 能效标识遵循GB/T 28569格式，而非SANS/IEC格式。
summary.zht: 中國電機須按GB 755-2019（IEC 60034-1等效）標注銘牌，包括額定電壓（380 V）、額定頻率（50 Hz）、額定功率（kW）、能效等級（按GB 18613-2020等級1/2/3）、IP等級和絕緣等級。GB 18613-2020要求標注能效等級。主要差異：(1) 中國額定電壓為380 V，而南非要求400 V；(2) GB 18613-2020等級標注（1/2/3級）與IEC IE1/IE2/IE3表示方式不同，但命名上對應；(3) 能效標識遵循GB/T 28569格式，而非SANS/IEC格式。

gap.en: Key nameplate gaps for South African market entry: (1) voltage must show 400 V (or dual range including 400 V) — 380 V-only nameplates will not satisfy NRCS; (2) efficiency class must be expressed as IE2/IE3/IE4 per IEC/SANS notation, not only as GB 18613 Grade 3/2/1; (3) energy efficiency label format must follow SANS/IEC conventions for LoA conformity assessment, not GB/T 28569. These are typically low-cost fixes (re-labelling, re-rating) but must be completed before NRCS LoA application.
gap.zh: 进入南非市场的主要铭牌差距：(1) 电压须标注400 V（或包含400 V的双电压范围）——仅标注380 V不符合NRCS要求；(2) 能效等级须按IEC/SANS表示法标注为IE2/IE3/IE4，而非仅使用GB 18613等级3/2/1；(3) 能效标识格式须遵循SANS/IEC规范进行LoA合规评估，而非GB/T 28569。这些通常是低成本修复措施（重新标注、重新额定），但须在申请NRCS LoA前完成。
gap.zht: 進入南非市場的主要銘牌差距：(1) 電壓須標注400 V（或包含400 V的雙電壓範圍）——僅標注380 V不符合NRCS要求；(2) 能效等級須按IEC/SANS表示法標注為IE2/IE3/IE4，而非僅使用GB 18613等級3/2/1；(3) 能效標識格式須遵循SANS/IEC規範進行LoA合規評估，而非GB/T 28569。這些通常是低成本修復措施（重新標注、重新額定），但須在申請NRCS LoA前完成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — correct nameplate marking per SANS 60034-1 is a condition for NRCS LoA and market surveillance compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 nameplate requirements enforced; GB 18613-2020 efficiency grade marking required; no South Africa-specific export marking obligation under Chinese law

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor nameplates typically show 380 V and GB 18613 grade notation, which will not satisfy South African NRCS LoA requirements directly. Exporters must re-rate or confirm 400 V suitability, update nameplate notation to IEC IE-class format, and align energy efficiency labelling to SANS/IEC conventions before NRCS LoA application. These are preparatory steps and do not guarantee LoA approval. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电机铭牌通常标注380 V及GB 18613等级表示，这将无法直接满足南非NRCS LoA要求。出口商须重新额定或确认400 V适用性，将铭牌标注更新为IEC IE等级格式，并在申请NRCS LoA前将能效标识调整为SANS/IEC规范。这些属于准备步骤，并不保证LoA获批。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電機銘牌通常標注380 V及GB 18613等級表示，這將無法直接滿足南非NRCS LoA要求。出口商須重新額定或確認400 V適用性，將銘牌標注更新為IEC IE等級格式，並在申請NRCS LoA前將能效標識調整為SANS/IEC規範。這些屬於準備步驟，並不保證LoA獲批。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
